behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names file paths (resolveMaxTokens.ts, chatConfig.ts, the three SKILL.md files), function name resolveMaxTokens, schema key toolResultMaxLength, literal section titles, and all required values (64000, 4096, 32000, 25000, etc.).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes expected behavior and required values but doesn't show implementation code; agent must figure out how to detect small-context patterns and structure the function.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests call resolveMaxTokens behaviorally and check toolResultMaxLength via text containing '25000' on the same line; multiple valid implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute resolveMaxTokens via node subprocess and run repo's vitest suites, not just text grep (only SKILL.md tests use text checks, which is appropriate for documentation).

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning a constant can't satisfy all test cases (64000 normal, 4096 small-context, 9999 user override, 12345 provider, 32000/64000 thinking modes); requires real logic.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All described behaviors (normal models, small-context, user override, provider maxOutput, thinking modes, tool result default, three skill files) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped under fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass, and repo CI section comment headers with descriptive function names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces TypeScript code and markdown docs, not structured data with schemas.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers match (e.g., packages/model-runtime/src/core/anthropicCompatibleFactory/resolveMaxTokens.ts, AgentChatConfigSchema, toolResultMaxLength).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file containing resolveMaxTokens but doesn't reveal the exact buggy line; localization within the file is left to agent.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch makes localized edits to chatConfig default and three SKILL.md files; no full-file rewrites contradicting other files.
